channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Talking Sense: Coming together to solve tough problems
item.description: Mariah Levison and Rob Fersh help people find consensus on how to solve divisive issues, ranging from prison reform to what art should hang in the Minnesota Capitol. Learn how they do it in this MPR News Talking Sense conversation hosted by MPR News correspondent Catharine Richert.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis, Catharine Richert, Maja Beckstrom, and Annie Baxter, MPR News

item.title: Trump assassination attempt task force holds final hearing; Secret Service director to testify
item.description: The House of Representatives' bipartisan task force probing the assassination attempts on Donald Trump is wrapping up its months-long investigation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio to testify at retired police officer's trial
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Former Proud Boys national chairman Enrique Tarrio is expected to testify on Thursday at the trial of a retired Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump nominates cryptocurrency advocate Paul Atkins as SEC chair
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced Wednesday that he intends to nominate cryptocurrency advocate Paul Atkins to chair the Securities and Exchange Commission. Trump said Atkins, the CEO of Patomak Partners and a former SEC commissioner, was a “proven leader for common sense regulations.
item.dc:creator: ALEX VEIGA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bitcoin tops $100,000 on optimism over Trump crypto plans
item.description: It last traded at $100,027 as of 0240 GMT, up 2.2% on the previous session, after earlier rising as high as $100,277.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, NewsNation

item.title: Fani Willis ordered to turn over communications in Trump case to conservative group
item.description: A Georgia judge ordered Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis to turn over to a conservative watchdog group any communications she may have with special counsel Jack Smith or the now-disbanded House Jan. 6 committee.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Austin endorses women in combat jobs and exhorts West Point cadets to defend the Constitution
item.description: Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin is forcefully endorsing having women in combat roles and emphasizing the military’s obligation to defend the U.S. Constitution.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump names Billy Long as IRS head
item.description: “I am pleased to announce that former Congressman Billy Long, of the Great State of Missouri, will be appointed to serve as the Commissioner of the Internal Revenue Service (IRS),” Trump wrote.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Democrat Jerry Nadler steps aside from top Judiciary role, avoiding party fight
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rep. Jerry Nadler announced Wednesday that he will be stepping down as the top Democrat on the House Judiciary Committee next year, avoiding an intra-party fight over a prominent position as the party prepares to confront a second Trump presidency.
item.dc:creator: FARNOUSH AMIRI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Memphis police use excessive force and discriminate against Black people, Justice Department finds
item.description: The Memphis Police Department uses excessive force and discriminates against Black people, according to the findings of a U.S. Department of Justice investigation launched after the beating death of Tyre Nichols after a traffic stop in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Sainz And Jonathan Mattise, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Takeaways from the Supreme Court arguments on transgender health care ban: Conservatives skeptical
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court heard the most high-profile case of its term on Wednesday, weighing Tennessee's ban on gender-affirming health care for transgender minors. Similar laws have been passed by other conservative-leaning states.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump taps Gail Slater to lead DOJ antitrust division
item.description: Gail Slater will take over the DOJ's high-profile antitrust cases against tech giants like Google and Apple.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Detroit Mayor Duggan, a longtime Democrat, will run for Michigan governor in 2026 as independent
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan, a longtime Democrat, says he will run for Michigan governor as an independent in 2026. “It’s clear to me that there are a lot of people in this country who are tired of both parties and tired of the system," Duggan said in an interview Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: COREY WILLIAMS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minneapolis City Council member Emily Koski joins mayor’s race
item.description: She joins Minnesota DFL Sen. Omar Fateh and the Rev. DeWayne Davis of Plymouth Congregational Church in challenging Mayor Jacob Frey, who’s running for reelection.
item.dc:creator: Megan Burks, MPR News

item.title: New LAPD chief says he will work to protect immigrants ahead of Trump's plans for mass deportations
item.description: The new Los Angeles police chief says in an interview with The Associated Press that his department is working with consulate offices for Mexico and other Central American countries to draft a plan to protect immigrants ahead of the Trump administration’s plans for mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: Jaimie Ding, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump criticizes Chronister after sheriff's withdrawal, days after praising him
item.description: President Donald Trump challenged reports of Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister's DEA withdrawal, saying he didn't want the sheriff days his cabinet days after nominating him.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden appears to rest his eyes at African summit in Angola
item.description: President Biden appeared to rest his eyes during a summit with African leaders in Lobito, Angola, during his travel overseas to visit African nations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump announces picks for Army secretary, trade adviser, hostage envoy, NASA administrator and more
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced several new additions to his incoming administration on Wednesday, including his selections for Army secretary and NASA adminstrator.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Garland, DOJ leads ask staffers to stay through Trump term: Report
item.description: Attorney General Merrick Garland is one of the top Justice Department officials asking staffers to stay with the agency, reports say.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Judge in Hunter Biden tax case rebukes president’s claims of unfair treatment
item.description: The federal judge overseeing Hunter Biden’s tax case issued a sharp rebuke of President Biden’s claims his son was unfairly prosecuted in new court filings Tuesday night. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump picks longtime ally Kash Patel to replace current FBI director
item.description: The president-elect plans to replace current FBI Director Christopher Wray with Patel, a close ally of the president-elect and former national security aide, has berated the Justice Department and the news media.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson, MPR News
